'''鈭歵-th-n''' ('''katathan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ecphore|ecphore]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ecphore|ecphore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-th-n
|-
! Lemma
| katathan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitathan|thitathan]] || [[word:jitathan|jitathan]] || [[word:shitathan|shitathan]] || [[word:kitathan|kitathan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutathan|thuthutathan]] || [[word:jujutathan|jujutathan]] || [[word:shushutathan|shushutathan]] || [[word:kukutathan|kukutathan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutathan|thutathan]] || [[word:jutathan|jutathan]] || [[word:shutathan|shutathan]] || [[word:kutathan|kutathan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutathan|thutathan]] || [[word:jutathan|jutathan]] || [[word:shutathan|shutathan]] || [[word:kutathan|kutathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetathan|thetathan]] || [[word:jetathan|jetathan]] || [[word:shetathan|shetathan]] || [[word:ketathan|ketathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotathan|thothotathan]] || [[word:jojotathan|jojotathan]] || [[word:shoshotathan|shoshotathan]] || [[word:kokotathan|kokotathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotathan|thotathan]] || [[word:jotathan|jotathan]] || [[word:shotathan|shotathan]] || [[word:kotathan|kotathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotathan|thotathan]] || [[word:jotathan|jotathan]] || [[word:shotathan|shotathan]] || [[word:kotathan|kotathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tathan|th忙tathan]] || [[word:j忙tathan|j忙tathan]] || [[word:sh忙tathan|sh忙tathan]] || [[word:k忙tathan|k忙tathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatathan|thathatathan]] || [[word:jajatathan|jajatathan]] || [[word:shashatathan|shashatathan]] || [[word:kakatathan|kakatathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatathan|thatathan]] || [[word:jatathan|jatathan]] || [[word:shatathan|shatathan]] || [[word:katathan|katathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatathan|thatathan]] || [[word:jatathan|jatathan]] || [[word:shatathan|shatathan]] || [[word:katathan|katathan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatathan|shatathan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatathan|goshatathan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatathan|gokishatathan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatathan眉|shatathan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatathankn眉|goshatathankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatathan眉|gokishatathan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatathansh毛|shatathansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatathanksh毛|goshatathanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatathansh毛|gokishatathansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatathanro|shatathanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatathankro|goshatathankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatathanro|gokishatathanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatathanmu|shatathanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatathankmu|goshatathankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatathanmu|gokishatathanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatathansher|shatathansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatathanksher|goshatathanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatathansher|gokishatathansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatathang|shatathang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatathankng|goshatathankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatathang|gokishatathang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatathanya|shatathanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatathankya|goshatathankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatathanya|gokishatathanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatathanyam|shatathanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatathankyam|goshatathankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatathanyam|gokishatathanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatathan眉sh毛|shatathan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatathankn眉sh毛|goshatathankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatathan眉sh毛|gokishatathan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatathan眉ro|shatathan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatathankn眉ro|goshatathankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatathan眉ro|gokishatathan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatathan眉mu|shatathan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatathankn眉mu|goshatathankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatathan眉mu|gokishatathan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatathansh毛n眉|shatathansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatathanksh毛n眉|goshatathanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatathansh毛n眉|gokishatathansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatathansh毛ro|shatathansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatathanksh毛ro|goshatathanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatathansh毛ro|gokishatathansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatathansh毛mu|shatathansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatathanksh毛mu|goshatathanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatathansh毛mu|gokishatathansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatathanron眉|shatathanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatathankron眉|goshatathankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatathanron眉|gokishatathanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatathanrosh毛|shatathanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatathankrosh毛|goshatathankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatathanrosh毛|gokishatathanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatathanromu|shatathanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatathankromu|goshatathankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatathanromu|gokishatathanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatathanmun眉|shatathanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatathankmun眉|goshatathankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatathanmun眉|gokishatathanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatathanmush毛|shatathanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatathankmush毛|goshatathankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatathanmush毛|gokishatathanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatathanmuro|shatathanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatathankmuro|goshatathankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatathanmuro|gokishatathanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
